授業目的: This course examines key issues in Japan-China relations since the mid-19th century. It will focus on contrastive narratives/interpretations of the trajectory of bilateral relations.
到達目標: After taking this course students will gain a deeper understanding of the contour of Japan-China relations in the 19th and 20th centuries. They will also appreciate the competing interpretations of key events in this history.

トピック.授業計画1: To be decided by student-teacher consultation. 《1,350minutes》
トピック.授業外学習2: To be decided by student-teacher consultation.

教科書/Required texts0: Readings available from LUNA or free online.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.

name: 【670】Contemporary Japan-China Relations／Contemporary Japan-China Relations
担当者: ツー　ティモシー（TSU TIMOTHY YUN HUI）
